description: A container with hazardous materials (HAZMAT) is scheduled to arrive. The HSSE officer must ensure it's handled correctly.

nodes.task_description: Receive the dangerous goods declaration (DGD) for the container and verify its IMO class.

expected_outcome.expected: Officer confirms the container holds Class 3 flammable liquids.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the container is assigned to be stacked in the designated HAZMAT segregation zone in the yard.

expected_outcome.expected: Officer verifies the yard plan places the container away from other incompatible goods.

nodes.task_description: Notify the terminal operations team of the container's arrival and handling requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: An alert is sent to the operations team to ensure special care is taken during its movement.
